name: MR0555258CompactifyingPicard_Basic.md
content:
# MR0555258CompactifyingPicard/Basic.lean

## Session summary (iter-041, prover mode: mathlib-build, strand-(b) brick 1)
- **Goal**: build `internalHom (I : X.Modules) : X.Modules ⥤ X.Modules` axiom-clean (brick 1
  of the relExt build).
- **Outcome**: `internalHom` confirmed a genuine **multi-iteration from-scratch Mathlib-gap
  layer** (evidence below). Did NOT fabricate the functor. Instead built its **foundational
  atom axiom-clean**: the per-section module structure that every internal-hom section carries.
- **Built axiom-clean (2 non-private instances + 6 private helpers, lines 1006–1151):**
  - `homModuleOverGlobalSections` (line 1093) — `Module Γ(Y,⊤) (M ⟶ N)` for `M N : Y.Modules`.
  - `linearOverGlobalSections` (line ~1129) — `Linear Γ(Y,⊤) Y.Modules` (whole category is
    `Γ(Y,⊤)`-linear; composition bilinear over global functions).
  - helpers (private): `globalSectionRestrict` (+ `_one/_zero/_mul/_add/_naturality`),
    `restrictScalars_map_smul`, `internalHomSmulVal`.
- **Build**: `lake build MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.Basic` exit 0. **Still 1 sorry** —
  `ext_finite_flat` (now ~line 2712), untouched. No new axiom, no new sorry.
- **Axioms**: both new instances `#print axioms` = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`.
- sorry count: **1 → 1** (unchanged; this iter adds infrastructure, not a sorry close).

## homModuleOverGlobalSections (line 1093) — RESOLVED
- **What**: `Module Γ(Y,⊤) (M ⟶ N)`. A global section `r : Γ(Y,⊤)` acts on `φ : M ⟶ N` by
  scaling each section component `φ.val.app U` by the restriction `r|_U`.
- **Why project-local**: the structure sheaf `Y.ringCatSheaf` is valued in `RingCat`, which
  forgets commutativity, so Mathlib's `Linear`-over-a-`CommRing` structure on `ModuleCat`
  hom-sets is NOT directly available on `SheafOfModules` hom-sets. Recovered the `CommRing` per
  open via `inferInstanceAs (CommRing Γ(Y, U.unop))` (defeq to the `RingCat` carrier — verified).
- **Approach**: build `r • φ` as `⟨internalHomSmulVal r φ⟩` where `internalHomSmulVal` packages a
  `PresheafOfModules.Hom` with app `U ↦ r|_U • φ.val.app U`. Naturality = the semilinear-
  restriction compatibility `restrictScalars_map_smul` (`(restrictScalars g).map (g a • h) =
  a • (restrictScalars g).map h`, proved pointwise via `restrictScalars.map_apply` +
  `.smul_def`) + `globalSectionRestrict_naturality` (global section restriction commutes with
  `R.map f`, by uniqueness of `Opens` morphisms into `⊤`) + `Linear.comp_smul`/`smul_comp` +
  `φ.val.naturality`. Module axioms by `SheafOfModules.hom_ext` → `PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`
  → section-level ModuleCat smul lemmas (`one/mul/add/zero` from ring-hom-ness of restriction).
- **Result**: RESOLVED — axiom-clean.

## linearOverGlobalSections (line ~1129) — RESOLVED
- **What**: `Linear Γ(Y,⊤) Y.Modules`. `smul_comp`/`comp_smul` proved by `hom_ext` to the
  section level + `Linear.{smul_comp,comp_smul}` on `ModuleCat`. Built on the module instance.
- **Result**: RESOLVED — axiom-clean. (The structural form: the whole category of `𝒪_Y`-modules
  is linear over the global functions — needed downstream for `internalHom` functoriality and
  the `𝒪_S`-linearity of `relExt`.)

## internalHom (NOT added) — FEASIBILITY: confirmed multi-iter from-scratch layer
Established absent from Mathlib v4.30.0 (loogle/grep, iter-041): no `internalHom`/`ihom`/
`sheafHom`/`MonoidalClosed` for `PresheafOfModules`/`SheafOfModules`; no `Linear` instance on
either; no over-open restriction functor for `PresheafOfModules`. The remaining sub-bricks after
the per-section module structure (this iter) are each substantial and absent:
- **(2) restriction maps + presheaf assembly** — for `V ⊆ U`, the map `(I|_U ⟶ M|_U) →
  (I|_V ⟶ M|_V)` is `Scheme.Modules.pullback (incl : ↑V ⟶ ↑U)` applied to the morphism, then
  transported `pullback incl (pullback U.ι I) ≅ pullback V.ι I` via `pullbackComp`; these must be
  assembled into a `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` with **semilinear** restriction maps over
  `Γ(X,U) → Γ(X,V)` and presheaf functoriality. This is the bulk; the `pullbackComp` coherence
  bookkeeping on hom-objects is heavy. (≥1–2 iters.)
- **(3) sheaf condition** — the section presheaf `U ↦ (I|_U ⟶ M|_U)` is already a sheaf when `M`
  is (morphisms of sheaves glue); package as `SheafOfModules`. (≥1 iter.)
- **(4) functoriality in `M`** (postcomposition) → the endofunctor `internalHom I`.
- **(5) `Additive` instance** (Hom additive in 2nd slot).
**Verdict**: buildable but ≥3–4 more iters, comparable to the affine-ess-surj / j_! /
monoidal-tensor layers. Anchoring `relExt`/`IsLFPAndFlatOn` remains UNSOUND (restates 1.10), so
the build is the only sound path — this iter is permanent progress on it. Next planner: continue
brick 1 sub-brick (2) (restriction maps + presheaf assembly) reusing `homModuleOverGlobalSections`
for the section modules (instantiate at `Y := ↑U`), OR escalate the iter-count to the user.

## Summary
- **Declarations added**: 2 non-private instances (`homModuleOverGlobalSections`,
  `linearOverGlobalSections`) + 6 private helpers (`globalSectionRestrict`,
  `globalSectionRestrict_{one,zero,mul,add,naturality}`, `restrictScalars_map_smul`,
  `internalHomSmulVal`). Lines 1006–1151.
- **Declarations blocked**: `internalHom` (the functor) — multi-iter layer, sub-bricks (2)–(5)
  above. Not added (no sorry, no fabrication).
- **sorry count**: 1 → 1 (only `ext_finite_flat`, untouched).

## Needs blueprint entry
Two NEW non-private decls with no blueprint block yet (lean_aux nodes — `archon dag-query
unmatched` will list them). Both are foundational infrastructure for `def:internalHom`:
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.homModuleOverGlobalSections` (Basic.lean:1093) —
  `Module Γ(Y,⊤) (M ⟶ N)`. Proof relies on: `inferInstanceAs (CommRing Γ(Y,U.unop))` for the
  per-open `CommRing`, ModuleCat `Linear`/`restrictScalars` API, `SheafOfModules.hom_ext` /
  `PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`, ring-hom-ness of structure-sheaf restriction. `\uses{}`:
  the existing `Γ(-,-)` section-module API. Suggested label `def:homModuleOverGlobalSections`,
  used-by `def:internalHom`.
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.linearOverGlobalSections` (Basic.lean:~1129) —
  `Linear Γ(Y,⊤) Y.Modules`. `\uses{def:homModuleOverGlobalSections}` + `Linear.{smul,comp}`
  on `ModuleCat`. Suggested label `def:linearOverGlobalSections`, used-by `def:internalHom`.
(The `def:internalHom` block already exists with `\lean{...internalHom}`; that pin still points
at an unbuilt functor — leave unmarked. These two atoms are its first realized ingredients.)

## Why I stopped
**Real progress**: 2 axiom-clean non-private instances added —
`homModuleOverGlobalSections` (line 1093) and `linearOverGlobalSections` (line ~1129) — plus 6
private helpers, all `sorryAx`-free, whole-file build exit 0, still 1 sorry. Then **blocked**:
the next internalHom sub-brick (semilinear restriction maps + `PresheafOfModules` assembly) is a
genuine heavy multi-iter piece requiring `Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp` coherence on hom-objects —
documented precisely above rather than attempted as a partial/sorry. No approaches were written-
but-unattempted: every route considered (Mathlib reuse, presheaf-level internal hom, slick adjoint,
the per-section atom) was either confirmed absent or built. Informal agent not called (the blocker
is a known-absent Mathlib layer, not a proof-search gap).
